message:
refactor(fwc): reformat truthfulness tests and update recipe export test for envelope shape

catalog.rs: additional rustfmt passes on the invariant tests committed
moments ago — long assert!/assert_eq! macro calls reformatted to
multi-line for consistency with project style.

main.rs: updated execute_recipe_export test to match the new command
envelope response shape — recipe export now returns a structured JSON
envelope with command/subcommand/mode/content fields instead of a raw
TOML string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
